title: jasione montana var. carionii
intro: Jasione montana var. carionii, also known as mountain bellflower, is a plant species in the bellflower family that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Jasione montana var. carionii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma.
